```
customers        (id, name, company, email, phone, logo, slug, active)
```

services:
  app:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    volumes:
      - .:/var/www/html
    depends_on:
      mysql:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      APP_ENV: local
      PHP_OPCACHE_ENABLE: 0

  nginx:
    image: nginx:1.25-alpine
    ports:
      - "${APP_PORT:-8080}:80"
    volumes:
      - .:/var/www/html
      - ./docker/nginx/default.conf:/etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf
    depends_on:
      - app

  mysql:
    image: mysql:8.0
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: rootsecret
      MYSQL_DATABASE: ${DB_DATABASE:-vcard_app}
      MYSQL_USER: ${DB_USERNAME:-vcard}
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD:-secret}
    ports:
      - "${DB_PORT:-3306}:3306"
    volumes:
      - mysql_data:/var/lib/mysql
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "mysqladmin", "ping", "-h", "localhost", "-u", "root", "-prootsecret"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 12

  node:
    image: node:20-alpine
    working_dir: /var/www/html
    volumes:
      - .:/var/www/html
    ports:
      - "${VITE_PORT:-5173}:5173"
    command: sh -c "npm install && npm run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0"
    profiles:
      - dev

volumes:
  mysql_data:

FROM php:8.3-fpm-alpine

RUN apk add --no-cache \
    git curl zip unzip bash \
    libpng-dev libzip-dev oniguruma-dev libxml2-dev \
    && docker-php-ext-install pdo pdo_mysql mbstring exif pcntl bcmath gd zip \
    && docker-php-ext-enable opcache

COPY --from=composer:latest /usr/bin/composer /usr/bin/composer

WORKDIR /var/www/html

RUN addgroup -g 1000 appgroup && adduser -u 1000 -G appgroup -s /bin/sh -D appuser

COPY --chown=appuser:appgroup . .

RUN if [ -f "composer.json" ]; then composer install --no-interaction --no-scripts 2>/dev/null || true; fi

RUN mkdir -p storage/framework/{sessions,views,cache} \
        storage/logs \
        bootstrap/cache \
    && chmod -R 777 storage bootstrap/cache 2>/dev/null || true

USER appuser

CMD ["php-fpm"]

APP_NAME="VCard Manager"
APP_ENV=local
APP_KEY=
APP_DEBUG=true
APP_URL=http://localhost:8080

LOG_CHANNEL=stack
LOG_DEPRECATIONS_CHANNEL=null
LOG_LEVEL=debug

DB_CONNECTION=mysql
DB_HOST=mysql
DB_PORT=3306
DB_DATABASE=vcard_app
DB_USERNAME=vcard
DB_PASSWORD=secret

BROADCAST_DRIVER=log
CACHE_DRIVER=file
FILESYSTEM_DISK=public
QUEUE_CONNECTION=sync
SESSION_DRIVER=file
SESSION_LIFETIME=120

APP_PORT=8080
DB_PORT=3306
VITE_PORT=5173

# VCard Manager — Laravel + Docker

## Context
Build a multi-admin SaaS vCard platform from scratch in an empty git repo.
Admins buy seats; each seat lets them publish one employee vCard page styled like the Ryan vCard template (sidebar profile + tabbed content: About / Resume / Skills / Portfolio).
Super-admin manages all admins and their seat balances. No payment gateway yet — seat allocation is manual.

---

## Stack
- PHP 8.3-FPM + Laravel 11
- MySQL 8 via Docker Compose
- Nginx Alpine reverse proxy
- Node 20 (Vite + Tailwind CSS + Alpine.js)
- No extra Composer packages beyond base Laravel

---

## Data Model

```
users               id, name, email, password, role(enum: super_admin|admin), seats_total(int default 0)
customers           id, user_id FK, name, company, email, phone, logo, slug(unique), active, timestamps
employees           id, customer_id FK, name, title, bio, avatar, email, phone,
                    linkedin, github, twitter, website, slug, active, timestamps
                    UNIQUE(customer_id, slug)
employee_skills     id, employee_id FK, name, level(0-100), sort_order
employee_experiences id, employee_id FK, company, role, start_date, end_date nullable, description, sort_order
employee_portfolio   id, employee_id FK, title, category, description, image, url, sort_order
seat_transactions   id, user_id FK, seats, notes, created_by FK users, timestamps
```

Seat check: `$user->employees()->where('active',true)->count() >= $user->seats_total`

---

## Routes

| Method | URI | Controller |
|--------|-----|------------|
| GET/POST | /login | Auth\LoginController |
| POST | /logout | Auth\LoginController |
| GET | /admin | Admin\DashboardController |
| GET/POST | /admin/customers | Admin\CustomerController (index/create/store) |
| GET/PUT/DELETE | /admin/customers/{id}/edit | Admin\CustomerController (edit/update/destroy) |
| GET/POST | /admin/customers/{customer}/employees | Admin\EmployeeController (index/create/store) |
| GET/PUT/DELETE | /admin/customers/{customer}/employees/{employee}/edit | Admin\EmployeeController |
| GET | /admin/seats | Admin\SeatController (my balance) |
| GET/POST | /admin/users | Admin\UserController (super_admin only) |
| GET | /{customerSlug}/{employeeSlug} | VCardController |

---

## Seat Logic
- `users.seats_total` = total seats purchased (updated by super_admin via SeatTransaction)
- `seats_used` = active employees count across all customers of that admin
- Creating an employee: check `seats_used < seats_total`, abort(403) otherwise
- Deactivating employee frees a seat immediately

---

## File List to Create

### Infrastructure
- `docker-compose.yml` ✓
- `Dockerfile` ✓
- `docker/nginx/default.conf` ✓
- `.env.example` ✓
- `setup.sh`
- `Makefile`

### Database

- `database/migrations/2024_01_01_000002_create_employees_table.php`
- `database/migrations/2024_01_01_000003_create_employee_skills_table.php`

- `database/migrations/2024_01_01_000006_create_seat_transactions_table.php`
- `database/seeders/DatabaseSeeder.php` (seeds super_admin + 3 admins)

### App Layer
- `app/Models/User.php`
- `app/Models/Customer.php`
- `app/Models/Employee.php`
- `app/Models/EmployeeSkill.php`
- `app/Models/EmployeeExperience.php`
- `app/Models/EmployeePortfolio.php`
- `app/Models/SeatTransaction.php`
- `app/Http/Controllers/Auth/LoginController.php`
- `app/Http/Controllers/Admin/DashboardController.php`

### Views (Blade + Tailwind + Alpine.js)
- `resources/views/layouts/admin.blade.php`
- `resources/views/auth/login.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/dashboard.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/customers/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/customers/create.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/customers/edit.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/employees/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/employees/form.blade.php` (shared create/edit)
- `resources/views/admin/seats/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/users/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/vcard/show.blade.php` ← Ryan-style public page

### Assets
- `tailwind.config.js`
- `resources/css/app.css`
- `resources/js/app.js`

---

## vCard Public Page Design
- Split layout: dark slate-900 sidebar (w-72) + white main content
- Sidebar: circular avatar, name, amber-500 title badge, contact icons, social links
- Main: sticky tab bar (About / Resume / Skills / Portfolio), Alpine.js tab switching
- Skill bars: animated width based on level %
- Experience: vertical timeline with dots
- Portfolio: 3-column grid with image hover overlay

---

## Seeded Accounts
| Email | Password | Role | Seats |
|-------|----------|------|-------|
| super@vcardapp.com | password | super_admin | 0 |
| admin1@vcardapp.com | password | admin | 5 |
| admin2@vcardapp.com | password | admin | 3 |
| admin3@vcardapp.com | password | admin | 3 |

---

## Setup Flow (for developer)
```bash
bash setup.sh         # creates .env, runs create-project, migrate, seed
docker compose up     # starts nginx + app + mysql
# open http://localhost:8080/login
```

---

## Verification
1. Login as super@vcardapp.com → see all users, add seats
2. Login as admin1 → create a customer, add employees up to seat limit
3. Try to add employee beyond seat limit → get 403 error message
4. Visit /{customerSlug}/{employeeSlug} → see vCard page
5. Upload avatar/logo → confirm file served correctly

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

echo "=== VCard Manager — First Time Setup ==="

# Copy env
if [ ! -f .env ]; then
  cp .env.example .env
  echo "✓ .env created from .env.example"
fi

# Start MySQL
echo "Starting MySQL..."
docker compose up -d mysql
echo "Waiting for MySQL to be ready (up to 60s)..."
timeout=60
until docker compose exec mysql mysqladmin ping -h localhost -u root -prootsecret --silent 2>/dev/null || [ $timeout -le 0 ]; do
  sleep 2
  timeout=$((timeout - 2))
done

# Scaffold Laravel (skip files that already exist)
echo "Creating Laravel scaffold (this may take a minute)..."
docker compose run --rm --no-deps app sh -c "
  cd /tmp && composer create-project laravel/laravel scaffold --prefer-dist --no-scripts -q 2>/dev/null
  for item in /tmp/scaffold/.[!.]* /tmp/scaffold/*; do
    [ -e \"\$item\" ] || continue
    name=\$(basename \"\$item\")
    [ -e \"/var/www/html/\$name\" ] || cp -r \"\$item\" \"/var/www/html/\$name\"
  done
  echo '✓ Laravel scaffold done'
"

# Install Composer deps
echo "Installing PHP dependencies..."
docker compose run --rm --no-deps app composer install --no-interaction

# Generate app key
docker compose run --rm --no-deps app php artisan key:generate

# Fix storage permissions
docker compose run --rm --no-deps app sh -c "
  mkdir -p storage/app/public/avatars storage/app/public/logos storage/app/public/portfolio
  chmod -R 777 storage bootstrap/cache
"

# Migrate and seed
echo "Running migrations and seeds..."
docker compose run --rm app php artisan migrate --seed --force

# Storage symlink
docker compose run --rm app php artisan storage:link 2>/dev/null || true

# Node deps + Tailwind
echo "Installing Node dependencies..."
docker compose run --rm --no-deps -e HOME=/tmp node sh -c "
  npm install &&
  npm install -D tailwindcss @tailwindcss/forms
"

echo ""
echo "=== Setup complete! ==="
echo ""
echo "  Start:  docker compose up"
echo "  Open:   http://localhost:8080"
echo ""
echo "  Accounts:"
echo "    super@vcardapp.com   / password  (super admin)"
echo "    admin1@vcardapp.com  / password  (5 seats)"
echo "    admin2@vcardapp.com  / password  (3 seats)"
echo "    admin3@vcardapp.com  / password  (3 seats)"

<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Foundation\Auth\User as Authenticatable;
use Illuminate\Notifications\Notifiable;

class User extends Authenticatable
{
    use HasFactory, Notifiable;

    protected $fillable = ['name', 'email', 'password', 'role', 'seats_total'];

    protected $hidden = ['password', 'remember_token'];

    protected function casts(): array
    {
        return [
            'email_verified_at' => 'datetime',
            'password' => 'hashed',
            'seats_total' => 'integer',
        ];
    }

    public function customers()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Customer::class);
    }

    public function seatTransactions()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(SeatTransaction::class);
    }

    public function isSuperAdmin(): bool
    {
        return $this->role === 'super_admin';
    }

    public function seatsUsed(): int
    {
        return Employee::whereHas('customer', fn ($q) => $q->where('user_id', $this->id))
            ->where('active', true)
            ->count();
    }

    public function hasAvailableSeat(): bool
    {
        return $this->seatsUsed() < $this->seats_total;
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;

class Customer extends Model
{
    protected $fillable = ['user_id', 'name', 'company', 'email', 'phone', 'logo', 'slug', 'active'];

    protected function casts(): array
    {
        return ['active' => 'boolean'];
    }

    public function user()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class);
    }

    public function employees()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Employee::class);
    }

    public static function generateSlug(string $name, ?int $excludeId = null): string
    {
        $base = Str::slug($name);
        $slug = $base;
        $i = 1;

        while (static::where('slug', $slug)->when($excludeId, fn ($q) => $q->where('id', '!=', $excludeId))->exists()) {
            $slug = "{$base}-{$i}";
            $i++;
        }

        return $slug;
    }
}

class LoginController extends Controller
{
    public function showLoginForm()
    {
        return view('auth.login');
    }

    public function login(Request $request)
    {
        $credentials = $request->validate([
            'email'    => 'required|email',
            'password' => 'required',
        ]);

        if (Auth::attempt($credentials, $request->boolean('remember'))) {
            $request->session()->regenerate();
            return redirect()->intended('/admin');
        }

        return back()->withErrors(['email' => 'Invalid credentials.'])->onlyInput('email');
    }

    public function logout(Request $request)
    {
        Auth::logout();
        $request->session()->invalidate();
        $request->session()->regenerateToken();
        return redirect('/login');
    }
}

            $recentEmployees = Employee::whereHas('customer', fn ($q) => $q->where('user_id', $user->id))
                ->with('customer')
                ->latest()
                ->limit(5)
                ->get();
        }

        return view('admin.dashboard', compact('stats', 'recentCustomers', 'recentEmployees'));

}

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Admin;

use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;

class CustomerController extends Controller
{
    public function index()
    {
        $user = Auth::user();
        $customers = $user->isSuperAdmin()
            ? Customer::with('user')->withCount('employees')->latest()->paginate(20)
            : $user->customers()->withCount('employees')->latest()->paginate(20);

        return view('admin.customers.index', compact('customers'));
    }

    public function create()
    {
        return view('admin.customers.create');
    }

    public function store(Request $request)
    {
        $data = $request->validate([
            'name'    => 'required|string|max:255',
            'company' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
            'email'   => 'nullable|email|max:255',
            'phone'   => 'nullable|string|max:50',
            'logo'    => 'nullable|image|max:2048',
            'active'  => 'boolean',
        ]);

        $data['user_id'] = Auth::id();
        $data['slug'] = Customer::generateSlug($data['name']);
        $data['active'] = $request->boolean('active', true);

        if ($request->hasFile('logo')) {
            $data['logo'] = $request->file('logo')->store('logos', 'public');
        }

        Customer::create($data);

        return redirect()->route('admin.customers.index')->with('success', 'Customer created successfully.');
    }

    public function edit(Customer $customer)
    {
        $this->authorizeCustomer($customer);
        return view('admin.customers.edit', compact('customer'));
    }

    public function update(Request $request, Customer $customer)
    {
        $this->authorizeCustomer($customer);

        $data = $request->validate([
            'name'    => 'required|string|max:255',
            'company' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
            'email'   => 'nullable|email|max:255',
            'phone'   => 'nullable|string|max:50',
            'logo'    => 'nullable|image|max:2048',
            'active'  => 'boolean',
        ]);

        $data['active'] = $request->boolean('active');

        if ($request->hasFile('logo')) {
            if ($customer->logo) {
                Storage::disk('public')->delete($customer->logo);
            }
            $data['logo'] = $request->file('logo')->store('logos', 'public');
        }

        $customer->update($data);

        return redirect()->route('admin.customers.index')->with('success', 'Customer updated successfully.');
    }

    public function destroy(Customer $customer)
    {
        $this->authorizeCustomer($customer);

        if ($customer->logo) {
            Storage::disk('public')->delete($customer->logo);
        }

        $customer->delete();

        return redirect()->route('admin.customers.index')->with('success', 'Customer deleted.');
    }

    private function authorizeCustomer(Customer $customer): void
    {
        if (!Auth::user()->isSuperAdmin() && $customer->user_id !== Auth::id()) {
            abort(403);
        }
    }
}

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Admin;

use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
use App\Models\Customer;
use App\Models\Employee;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;

class EmployeeController extends Controller
{
    public function index(Customer $customer)
    {
        $this->authorizeCustomer($customer);
        $employees = $customer->employees()->latest()->paginate(20);
        return view('admin.employees.index', compact('customer', 'employees'));
    }

    public function create(Customer $customer)
    {
        $this->authorizeCustomer($customer);

        $user = Auth::user();
        if (!$user->isSuperAdmin() && !$user->hasAvailableSeat()) {
            return redirect()->route('admin.seats.index')
                ->with('error', "You've used all {$user->seats_total} seats. Please contact support to purchase more.");
        }

        return view('admin.employees.form', compact('customer'));
    }

    public function store(Request $request, Customer $customer)
    {
        $this->authorizeCustomer($customer);

        $user = Auth::user();
        if (!$user->isSuperAdmin() && !$user->hasAvailableSeat()) {
            abort(403, 'No available seats.');
        }

        $data = $this->validateEmployee($request);
        $data['customer_id'] = $customer->id;
        $data['slug'] = Employee::generateSlug($data['name'], $customer->id);
        $data['active'] = $request->boolean('active', true);

        if ($request->hasFile('avatar')) {
            $data['avatar'] = $request->file('avatar')->store('avatars', 'public');
        }

        $employee = Employee::create($data);
        $this->syncRelations($employee, $request);

        return redirect()->route('admin.customers.employees.index', $customer)
            ->with('success', "Employee {$employee->name} created. vCard live at /{$customer->slug}/{$employee->slug}");
    }

    public function edit(Customer $customer, Employee $employee)
    {
        $this->authorizeCustomer($customer);
        $employee->load(['skills', 'experiences', 'portfolio']);
        return view('admin.employees.form', compact('customer', 'employee'));
    }

    public function update(Request $request, Customer $customer, Employee $employee)
    {
        $this->authorizeCustomer($customer);

        $data = $this->validateEmployee($request);
        $data['active'] = $request->boolean('active');

        if ($request->hasFile('avatar')) {
            if ($employee->avatar) {
                Storage::disk('public')->delete($employee->avatar);
            }
            $data['avatar'] = $request->file('avatar')->store('avatars', 'public');
        }

        $employee->update($data);
        $this->syncRelations($employee, $request);

        return redirect()->route('admin.customers.employees.index', $customer)
            ->with('success', 'Employee updated successfully.');
    }

    public function destroy(Customer $customer, Employee $employee)
    {
        $this->authorizeCustomer($customer);

        if ($employee->avatar) {
            Storage::disk('public')->delete($employee->avatar);
        }

        $employee->portfolio->each(function ($item) {
            if ($item->image) {
                Storage::disk('public')->delete($item->image);
            }
        });

        $employee->delete();

        return redirect()->route('admin.customers.employees.index', $customer)
            ->with('success', 'Employee deleted.');
    }

    private function validateEmployee(Request $request): array
    {
        return $request->validate([
            'name'     => 'required|string|max:255',
            'title'    => 'nullable|string|max:255',
            'bio'      => 'nullable|string',
            'email'    => 'nullable|email|max:255',
            'phone'    => 'nullable|string|max:50',
            'linkedin' => 'nullable|url|max:255',
            'github'   => 'nullable|url|max:255',
            'twitter'  => 'nullable|url|max:255',
            'website'  => 'nullable|url|max:255',
            'avatar'   => 'nullable|image|max:3072',
            'active'   => 'boolean',
        ]);
    }

    private function syncRelations(Employee $employee, Request $request): void
    {
        $employee->skills()->delete();
        foreach ($request->input('skills', []) as $i => $skill) {
            if (!empty($skill['name'])) {
                $employee->skills()->create([
                    'name'       => $skill['name'],
                    'level'      => (int) ($skill['level'] ?? 80),
                    'sort_order' => $i,
                ]);
            }
        }

        $employee->experiences()->delete();
        foreach ($request->input('experiences', []) as $i => $exp) {
            if (!empty($exp['company'])) {
                $employee->experiences()->create([
                    'company'     => $exp['company'],
                    'role'        => $exp['role'] ?? '',
                    'start_date'  => $exp['start_date'] ?? now(),
                    'end_date'    => $exp['end_date'] ?: null,
                    'description' => $exp['description'] ?? null,
                    'sort_order'  => $i,
                ]);
            }
        }

        $existingPortfolio = $employee->portfolio()->get()->keyBy('id');
        $employee->portfolio()->delete();
        foreach ($request->input('portfolio', []) as $i => $item) {
            if (!empty($item['title'])) {
                $imagePath = null;

                if ($request->hasFile("portfolio_images.{$i}")) {
                    $imagePath = $request->file("portfolio_images.{$i}")->store('portfolio', 'public');
                } elseif (!empty($item['existing_image'])) {
                    $imagePath = $item['existing_image'];
                }

                $employee->portfolio()->create([
                    'title'       => $item['title'],
                    'category'    => $item['category'] ?? null,
                    'description' => $item['description'] ?? null,
                    'image'       => $imagePath,
                    'url'         => $item['url'] ?? null,
                    'sort_order'  => $i,
                ]);
            }
        }
    }

    private function authorizeCustomer(Customer $customer): void
    {
        if (!Auth::user()->isSuperAdmin() && $customer->user_id !== Auth::id()) {
            abort(403);
        }
    }
}

        foreach ($request->input('experiences', []) as $i => $exp) {
            if (!empty($exp['company'])) {
                $employee->experiences()->create([
                    'company'     => $exp['company'],
                    'role'        => $exp['role'] ?? '',
                    'start_date'  => $exp['start_date'] ?? now(),
                    'end_date'    => $exp['end_date'] ?: null,
                    'description' => $exp['description'] ?? null,
                    'sort_order'  => $i,
                ]);
            }
        }

        $existingPortfolio = $employee->portfolio()->get()->keyBy('id');
        $employee->portfolio()->delete();
        foreach ($request->input('portfolio', []) as $i => $item) {
            if (!empty($item['title'])) {
                $imagePath = null;

                if ($request->hasFile("portfolio_images.{$i}")) {
                    $imagePath = $request->file("portfolio_images.{$i}")->store('portfolio', 'public');
                } elseif (!empty($item['existing_image'])) {
                    $imagePath = $item['existing_image'];
                }

                $employee->portfolio()->create([
                    'title'       => $item['title'],
                    'category'    => $item['category'] ?? null,
                    'description' => $item['description'] ?? null,
                    'image'       => $imagePath,
                    'url'         => $item['url'] ?? null,
                    'sort_order'  => $i,
                ]);
            }
        }
    }

    private function authorizeCustomer(Customer $customer): void
    {
        if (!Auth::user()->isSuperAdmin() && $customer->user_id !== Auth::id()) {
            abort(403);
        }
    }
}

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Admin;

use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
use App\Models\SeatTransaction;
use App\Models\User;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;

class SeatController extends Controller
{
    public function index()
    {
        $user = Auth::user();

        if ($user->isSuperAdmin()) {
            $admins = User::where('role', 'admin')
                ->withCount(['customers'])
                ->get()
                ->map(function ($admin) {
                    $admin->seats_used = $admin->seatsUsed();
                    return $admin;
                });
            $transactions = SeatTransaction::with(['user', 'creator'])->latest()->paginate(20);
        } else {
            $admins = null;
            $transactions = $user->seatTransactions()->with('creator')->latest()->paginate(20);
        }

        return view('admin.seats.index', compact('user', 'admins', 'transactions'));
    }

    public function addSeats(Request $request)
    {
        $request->validate([
            'user_id' => 'required|exists:users,id',
            'seats'   => 'required|integer|min:1|max:1000',
            'notes'   => 'nullable|string|max:500',
        ]);

        $targetUser = User::findOrFail($request->user_id);

        SeatTransaction::create([
            'user_id'    => $targetUser->id,
            'seats'      => $request->seats,
            'notes'      => $request->notes,
            'created_by' => Auth::id(),
        ]);

        $targetUser->increment('seats_total', $request->seats);

        return back()->with('success', "{$request->seats} seat(s) added to {$targetUser->name}.");
    }
}

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Hash;

class UserController extends Controller
{
    public function index()
    {
        $users = User::where('role', 'admin')
            ->withCount('customers')
            ->get()
            ->map(function ($user) {
                $user->seats_used = $user->seatsUsed();
                return $user;
            });

        return view('admin.users.index', compact('users'));
    }

    public function store(Request $request)
    {
        $data = $request->validate([
            'name'     => 'required|string|max:255',
            'email'    => 'required|email|unique:users',
            'password' => 'required|string|min:8|confirmed',
        ]);

        User::create([
            'name'        => $data['name'],
            'email'       => $data['email'],
            'password'    => Hash::make($data['password']),
            'role'        => 'admin',
            'seats_total' => 0,
        ]);

        return back()->with('success', 'Admin user created.');
    }

    public function destroy(User $user)
    {
        if ($user->role === 'super_admin') {
            abort(403);
        }

        $user->delete();
        return back()->with('success', 'User deleted.');
    }
}

namespace App\Http\Middleware;

use Closure;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

class EnsureAdmin extends Middleware
{
    public function handle(Request $request, Closure $next, string $role = 'any'): Response
    {
        if (!Auth::check()) {
            return redirect('/login');
        }

        $user = Auth::user();

        if ($role === 'super_admin' && !$user->isSuperAdmin()) {
            abort(403, 'Super admin access required.');
        }

        if (!in_array($user->role, ['admin', 'super_admin'])) {
            abort(403);
        }

        return $next($request);
    }
}

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

echo "=== VCard Manager — First Time Setup ==="

# Copy env
if [ ! -f .env ]; then
  cp .env.example .env
  echo "✓ .env created from .env.example"
fi

# Start MySQL
echo "Starting MySQL..."
docker compose up -d mysql
echo "Waiting for MySQL to be ready (up to 60s)..."
timeout=60
until docker compose exec mysql mysqladmin ping -h localhost -u root -prootsecret --silent 2>/dev/null || [ $timeout -le 0 ]; do
  sleep 2
  timeout=$((timeout - 2))
done

# Scaffold Laravel (skip files that already exist)
echo "Creating Laravel scaffold (this may take a minute)..."
docker compose run --rm --no-deps app sh -c "
  cd /tmp && composer create-project laravel/laravel scaffold --prefer-dist --no-scripts -q 2>/dev/null
  for item in /tmp/scaffold/.[!.]* /tmp/scaffold/*; do
    [ -e \"\$item\" ] || continue
    name=\$(basename \"\$item\")
    [ -e \"/var/www/html/\$name\" ] || cp -r \"\$item\" \"/var/www/html/\$name\"
  done
  echo '✓ Laravel scaffold done'
"

# Install Composer deps
echo "Installing PHP dependencies..."
docker compose run --rm --no-deps app composer install --no-interaction

# Generate app key
docker compose run --rm --no-deps app php artisan key:generate

# Fix storage permissions
docker compose run --rm --no-deps app sh -c "
  mkdir -p storage/app/public/avatars storage/app/public/logos storage/app/public/portfolio
  chmod -R 777 storage bootstrap/cache
"

# Migrate and seed
echo "Running migrations and seeds..."
docker compose run --rm app php artisan migrate --seed --force

# Storage symlink
docker compose run --rm app php artisan storage:link 2>/dev/null || true

# Node deps + Tailwind
echo "Installing Node dependencies..."
docker compose run --rm --no-deps -e HOME=/tmp node sh -c "
  npm install &&
  npm install -D tailwindcss @tailwindcss/forms
"

echo ""
echo "=== Setup complete! ==="
echo ""
echo "  Start:  docker compose up"
echo "  Open:   http://localhost:8080"
echo ""
echo "  Accounts:"
echo "    super@vcardapp.com   / password  (super admin)"
echo "    admin1@vcardapp.com  / password  (5 seats)"
echo "    admin2@vcardapp.com  / password  (3 seats)"
echo "    admin3@vcardapp.com  / password  (3 seats)"

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

echo "=== VCard Manager — First Time Setup ==="

# Copy env
if [ ! -f .env ]; then
  cp .env.example .env
  echo "✓ .env created from .env.example"
fi

# Start MySQL
echo "Starting MySQL..."
docker compose up -d mysql
echo "Waiting for MySQL to be ready (up to 60s)..."
timeout=60
until docker compose exec mysql mysqladmin ping -h localhost -u root -prootsecret --silent 2>/dev/null || [ $timeout -le 0 ]; do
  sleep 2
  timeout=$((timeout - 2))
done

# Scaffold Laravel (skip files that already exist)
echo "Creating Laravel scaffold (this may take a minute)..."
docker compose run --rm --no-deps app sh -c "
  cd /tmp && composer create-project laravel/laravel scaffold --prefer-dist --no-scripts -q 2>/dev/null
  for item in /tmp/scaffold/.[!.]* /tmp/scaffold/*; do
    [ -e \"\$item\" ] || continue
    name=\$(basename \"\$item\")
    [ -e \"/var/www/html/\$name\" ] || cp -r \"\$item\" \"/var/www/html/\$name\"
  done
  echo '✓ Laravel scaffold done'
"

# Install Composer deps
echo "Installing PHP dependencies..."
docker compose run --rm --no-deps app composer install --no-interaction

# Generate app key
docker compose run --rm --no-deps app php artisan key:generate

# Fix storage permissions
docker compose run --rm --no-deps app sh -c "
  mkdir -p storage/app/public/avatars storage/app/public/logos storage/app/public/portfolio
  chmod -R 777 storage bootstrap/cache
"

# Migrate and seed
echo "Running migrations and seeds..."
docker compose run --rm app php artisan migrate --seed --force

# Storage symlink
docker compose run --rm app php artisan storage:link 2>/dev/null || true

# Node deps + Tailwind
echo "Installing Node dependencies..."
docker compose run --rm --no-deps -e HOME=/tmp node sh -c "
  npm install &&
  npm install alpinejs &&
  npm install -D tailwindcss @tailwindcss/forms autoprefixer
"

# Build assets (creates public/build for production-style serving)
echo "Building frontend assets..."
docker compose run --rm --no-deps -e HOME=/tmp node sh -c "npm run build"

echo ""
echo "=== Setup complete! ==="
echo ""
echo "  Production-style:  docker compose up"
echo "  With HMR (dev):    docker compose --profile dev up"
echo "  Open:              http://localhost:8080"
echo ""
echo "  Accounts:"

echo "    admin1@vcardapp.com  / password  (5 seats)"
echo "    admin2@vcardapp.com  / password  (3 seats)"
echo "    admin3@vcardapp.com  / password  (3 seats)"

# VCard Manager

A multi-admin SaaS platform for publishing employee vCard pages. Each admin buys seats and uses them to create public profile pages for their clients' employees.

**Live vCard URL format:** `http://localhost:8085/{company-slug}/{employee-slug}`

---

## Requirements

- [Docker Desktop](https://www.docker.com/products/docker-desktop/)
- Bash (Git Bash on Windows is fine)

---

## First-time setup

```bash
bash setup.sh
```

The script will:
1. Create `.env` from `.env.example`
2. Start MySQL and wait for it to be healthy
3. Scaffold base Laravel into the project (preserving all custom files)
4. Install PHP and Node dependencies
5. Run database migrations and seed test accounts
6. Build frontend assets (Tailwind CSS + Alpine.js)

---

## Running the project

```bash
# Start (uses pre-built assets)
docker compose up

# Start with Vite HMR for frontend development
docker compose --profile dev up
```

Open **http://localhost:8085**

---

## Test accounts

| Email | Password | Role | Seats |
|-------|----------|------|-------|
| super@vcardapp.com | password | Super Admin | — |
| admin1@vcardapp.com | password | Admin | 5 |
| admin2@vcardapp.com | password | Admin | 3 |
| admin3@vcardapp.com | password | Admin | 3 |

---

## Architecture

```
Users (admins)
  └── Customers           — companies managed by an admin
        └── Employees     — each employee has one public vCard
              ├── Skills
              ├── Experiences
              └── Portfolio items
```

### Seat system
- Each admin has a `seats_total` quota set by the super admin
- Creating an active employee consumes 1 seat
- Deactivating an employee frees its seat
- The super admin adds seats via **Admin → Seats** panel

---

## Admin panel features

| Section | Who can access | What it does |
|---------|---------------|--------------|
| Dashboard | All | Stats, recent customers & employees |
| Customers | All | Create/edit customers with logo upload |
| Employees | All | Create/edit employee vCards (per customer) |
| Seats | All | View usage; super admin adds seats to any admin |
| Admins | Super admin | Create/delete admin accounts |

### Employee form sections
Each employee vCard has four editable sections:
1. **Basic Info** — name, title, bio, contact details, social URLs, profile photo
2. **Skills** — name + proficiency level (0–100%)
3. **Experience** — company, role, dates, description (timeline on public page)
4. **Portfolio** — title, category, image, URL, description (grid on public page)

---

## Public vCard page

Modelled after the Ryan vCard template:

- **Sidebar (dark)** — circular profile photo, name, title badge, contact icons, social links
- **Main content** — sticky tab bar switching between About / Resume / Skills / Portfolio
- **Skills** — animated progress bars
- **Experience** — vertical dot timeline
- **Portfolio** — hover-reveal project links

---

## Development commands

```bash
make setup          # run setup.sh
make up             # docker compose up -d
make dev            # start with Vite HMR (--profile dev)
make down           # stop containers
make shell          # open shell in app container
make artisan <cmd>  # run any artisan command
make migrate        # run migrations
make fresh          # migrate:fresh --seed (wipes data)
make mysql          # open MySQL CLI
make logs           # tail app + nginx logs
```

---

## Environment variables

Key variables in `.env` (copied from `.env.example`):

| Variable | Default | Notes |
|----------|---------|-------|
| `APP_PORT` | `8085` | Nginx port on host |
| `DB_PORT` | `3306` | MySQL port on host |
| `VITE_PORT` | `5173` | Vite HMR port (dev profile) |
| `DB_DATABASE` | `vcard_app` | MySQL database name |
| `DB_PASSWORD` | `secret` | MySQL user password |

---

## Project structure

```
app/Http/Controllers/Admin/   — admin panel controllers
app/Http/Controllers/Auth/    — login / logout
app/Http/Controllers/         — VCardController (public page)
app/Http/Middleware/           — EnsureAdmin (role-based guard)
app/Models/                   — 7 Eloquent models
database/migrations/          — 7 custom migrations
database/seeders/             — seeds 4 user accounts
resources/views/
  layouts/admin.blade.php     — sidebar admin layout
  vcard/show.blade.php        — public profile page
  admin/{customers,employees,seats,users}/
routes/web.php                — all application routes
docker-compose.yml            — 4 services: app, nginx, mysql, node
Dockerfile                    — PHP 8.3-FPM + Composer
```

---

## Tech stack

- **Backend:** PHP 8.3, Laravel 11
- **Database:** MySQL 8
- **Frontend:** Tailwind CSS v3, Alpine.js v3, Vite
- **Dev environment:** Docker Compose

input.content:
# VCard Manager — Claude Context

## What this project is
A Laravel 11 SaaS platform where admins manage customers and publish employee vCard pages.
Each admin buys "seats"; one seat = one active public vCard at `/{customerSlug}/{employeeSlug}`.
A super admin manages all admins and their seat balances. No payment gateway — seat allocation is manual.

## Stack
- PHP 8.3-FPM + Laravel 11 (no Breeze/Jetstream — custom auth)
- MySQL 8 via Docker Compose
- Nginx Alpine as reverse proxy
- Node 20 + Vite + Tailwind CSS v3 + Alpine.js v3
- File storage: Laravel `public` disk → `storage/app/public/` symlinked to `public/storage/`

## Important: setup flow
This repo contains only the application layer. `setup.sh` runs `composer create-project laravel/laravel`
into `/tmp/scaffold` then `cp -n` (no-clobber) copies base Laravel files into the project root.
Our custom files are never overwritten. Files NOT in this repo (auto-generated at setup):
`artisan`, `composer.json`, `composer.lock`, `package.json`, `package-lock.json`,
`config/`, `public/index.php`, `bootstrap/providers.php`, `storage/`, `vite.config.js`, `.gitignore`.

## Ports
- App (Nginx): **8085** (was changed from 8080)
- MySQL: 3306
- Vite HMR: 5173 (only with `--profile dev`)

## Seeded accounts
| Email | Password | Role |
|-------|----------|------|
| super@vcardapp.com | password | super_admin |
| admin1@vcardapp.com | password | admin (5 seats) |
| admin2@vcardapp.com | password | admin (3 seats) |
| admin3@vcardapp.com | password | admin (3 seats) |

## Key file locations

```
app/
  Http/
    Controllers/
      Auth/LoginController.php          — login/logout
      Admin/DashboardController.php     — stats dashboard
      Admin/CustomerController.php      — customer CRUD
      Admin/EmployeeController.php      — employee CRUD + seat check + file uploads
      Admin/SeatController.php          — seat balance view + super admin: add seats
      Admin/UserController.php          — super admin: manage admin users
    VCardController.php                 — public vCard page
    Middleware/EnsureAdmin.php          — auth guard, optional super_admin role check
  Models/
    User.php                            — role enum, seats_total, seatsUsed(), hasAvailableSeat()
    Customer.php                        — belongs to User, generateSlug()
    Employee.php                        — belongs to Customer, generateSlug()
    EmployeeSkill / Experience / Portfolio / SeatTransaction
routes/web.php                          — all routes
bootstrap/app.php                       — registers 'admin' middleware alias
database/
  migrations/                           — 7 custom migrations (2024_01_01_*)
  seeders/DatabaseSeeder.php
resources/views/
  layouts/admin.blade.php               — sidebar layout for all admin pages
  auth/login.blade.php                  — standalone dark login page
  admin/dashboard.blade.php             — stats + recent items
  admin/customers/{index,create,edit}
  admin/employees/{index,form}          — form.blade.php is shared create/edit with Alpine.js tabs
  admin/seats/index.blade.php           — seat balance; super admin sees all admins + add-seats form
  admin/users/index.blade.php           — super admin only
  vcard/show.blade.php                  — public Ryan-style vCard page
  components/stat-card.blade.php
```

## Data model relationships
```
users
  └── customers (user_id)
        └── employees (customer_id)
              ├── employee_skills (employee_id)
              ├── employee_experiences (employee_id)
              └── employee_portfolio (employee_id)
seat_transactions (user_id, created_by → users)
```

## Seat enforcement
- `User::seatsUsed()` — counts active employees across all customers owned by this user
- `User::hasAvailableSeat()` — `seatsUsed() < seats_total`
- Checked in `EmployeeController::create()` (redirect with error) and `store()` (abort 403)
- Super admins bypass seat checks

## Route naming convention
```
admin.dashboard
admin.customers.{index,create,store,edit,update,destroy}
admin.customers.employees.{index,create,store,edit,update,destroy}
admin.seats.index
admin.seats.add            (POST, super_admin only)
admin.users.{index,store,destroy}  (super_admin only)
vcard.show                 /{customerSlug}/{employeeSlug}
```

## Middleware
`'admin'` alias → `EnsureAdmin::handle($request, $next, $role = 'any')`
- `middleware('admin')` — allows any admin or super_admin
- `middleware('admin:super_admin')` — super_admin only

## Employee form (most complex view)
`admin/employees/form.blade.php` is shared for create and edit. It uses:
- Alpine.js `x-data` with arrays for skills, experiences, portfolio
- Tabbed UI: Basic Info / Skills / Experience / Portfolio
- Dynamic add/remove rows powered by Alpine
- Hidden `existing_image` inputs preserve portfolio images on re-save
- File inputs named `portfolio_images[{index}]` for new uploads

Controller `syncRelations()` deletes all related rows then recreates from posted arrays.

## File upload paths (public disk)
- Avatars:   `avatars/{filename}`
- Logos:     `logos/{filename}`
- Portfolio: `portfolio/{filename}`

## Frontend
- Tailwind v3 with `@tailwindcss/forms` plugin
- `tailwind.config.js` scans `resources/**/*.blade.php` and `resources/**/*.js`
- `postcss.config.js` wires Tailwind + autoprefixer into Vite
- Alpine.js imported in `resources/js/app.js` and started globally
- `resources/js/app.js` also imports Laravel's `bootstrap.js` (axios + CSRF)

## Docker services
- `app`   — PHP 8.3-FPM, mounts project root
- `nginx` — reverse proxy on port 8085
- `mysql` — MySQL 8, health-checked before app starts
- `node`  — (profile: dev) Vite dev server with HMR on 5173

## Common development commands
```bash
bash setup.sh                          # first-time setup
make up                                # docker compose up -d
make dev                               # start with Vite HMR
make shell                             # sh into app container
make artisan migrate                   # run migrations
make fresh                             # migrate:fresh --seed
make mysql                             # open MySQL shell
docker compose run --rm app php artisan <cmd>
```

`artisan`, `composer.json`, `composer.lock`, `package.json`, `package-lock.json`,
`config/`, `public/index.php`, `bootstrap/providers.php`, `storage/`, `vite.config.js`, `.gitignore`.

## Ports
- App (Nginx): **8085** (was changed from 8080)
- MySQL: 3306
- Vite HMR: 5173 (only with `--profile dev`)

## Seeded accounts
| Email | Password | Role |
|-------|----------|------|
| super@vcardapp.com | password | super_admin |
| admin1@vcardapp.com | password | admin (5 seats) |
| admin2@vcardapp.com | password | admin (3 seats) |
| admin3@vcardapp.com | password | admin (3 seats) |

## Key file locations

```
app/
  Http/
    Controllers/
      Auth/LoginController.php          — login/logout
      Admin/DashboardController.php     — stats dashboard
      Admin/CustomerController.php      — customer CRUD
      Admin/EmployeeController.php      — employee CRUD + seat check + file uploads
      Admin/SeatController.php          — seat balance view + super admin: add seats
      Admin/UserController.php          — super admin: manage admin users
    VCardController.php                 — public vCard page
    Middleware/EnsureAdmin.php          — auth guard, optional super_admin role check
  Models/
    User.php                            — role enum, seats_total, seatsUsed(), hasAvailableSeat()
    Customer.php                        — belongs to User, generateSlug()
    Employee.php                        — belongs to Customer, generateSlug()
    EmployeeSkill / Experience / Portfolio / SeatTransaction
routes/web.php                          — all routes
bootstrap/app.php                       — registers 'admin' middleware alias
database/
  migrations/                           — 7 custom migrations (2024_01_01_*)
  seeders/DatabaseSeeder.php
resources/views/
  layouts/admin.blade.php               — sidebar layout for all admin pages
  auth/login.blade.php                  — standalone dark login page
  admin/dashboard.blade.php             — stats + recent items
  admin/customers/{index,create,edit}
  admin/employees/{index,form}          — form.blade.php is shared create/edit with Alpine.js tabs
  admin/seats/index.blade.php           — seat balance; super admin sees all admins + add-seats form
  admin/users/index.blade.php           — super admin only
  vcard/show.blade.php                  — public Ryan-style vCard page
  components/stat-card.blade.php
```

## Data model relationships
```
users
  └── customers (user_id)
        └── employees (customer_id)
              ├── employee_skills (employee_id)
              ├── employee_experiences (employee_id)
              └── employee_portfolio (employee_id)
seat_transactions (user_id, created_by → users)
```

## Seat enforcement
- `User::seatsUsed()` — counts active employees across all customers owned by this user
- `User::hasAvailableSeat()` — `seatsUsed() < seats_total`
- Checked in `EmployeeController::create()` (redirect with error) and `store()` (abort 403)
- Super admins bypass seat checks

## Route naming convention
```
admin.dashboard
admin.customers.{index,create,store,edit,update,destroy}
admin.customers.employees.{index,create,store,edit,update,destroy}
admin.seats.index
admin.seats.add            (POST, super_admin only)
admin.users.{index,store,destroy}  (super_admin only)
vcard.show                 /{customerSlug}/{employeeSlug}
```

## Middleware
`'admin'` alias → `EnsureAdmin::handle($request, $next, $role = 'any')`
- `middleware('admin')` — allows any admin or super_admin
- `middleware('admin:super_admin')` — super_admin only

## Employee form (most complex view)
`admin/employees/form.blade.php` is shared for create and edit. It uses:
- Alpine.js `x-data` with arrays for skills, experiences, portfolio
- Tabbed UI: Basic Info / Skills / Experience / Portfolio
- Dynamic add/remove rows powered by Alpine
- Hidden `existing_image` inputs preserve portfolio images on re-save
- File inputs named `portfolio_images[{index}]` for new uploads

Controller `syncRelations()` deletes all related rows then recreates from posted arrays.

## File upload paths (public disk)
- Avatars:   `avatars/{filename}`
- Logos:     `logos/{filename}`
- Portfolio: `portfolio/{filename}`

## Frontend
- Tailwind v3 with `@tailwindcss/forms` plugin
- `tailwind.config.js` scans `resources/**/*.blade.php` and `resources/**/*.js`
- `postcss.config.js` wires Tailwind + autoprefixer into Vite
- Alpine.js imported in `resources/js/app.js` and started globally
- `resources/js/app.js` also imports Laravel's `bootstrap.js` (axios + CSRF)

## Docker services
- `app`   — PHP 8.3-FPM, mounts project root
- `nginx` — reverse proxy on port 8085
- `mysql` — MySQL 8, health-checked before app starts
- `node`  — (profile: dev) Vite dev server with HMR on 5173

## Common development commands
```bash
bash setup.sh                          # first-time setup
make up                                # docker compose up -d
make dev                               # start with Vite HMR
make shell                             # sh into app container
make artisan migrate                   # run migrations
make fresh                             # migrate:fresh --seed
make mysql                             # open MySQL shell
docker compose run --rm app php artisan <cmd>
```

input.content:
# VCard Manager

A multi-admin SaaS platform for publishing employee vCard pages. Each admin buys seats and uses them to create public profile pages for their clients' employees.

**Live vCard URL format:** `http://localhost:8085/{company-slug}/{employee-slug}`

---

## Requirements

- [Docker Desktop](https://www.docker.com/products/docker-desktop/)
- Bash (Git Bash on Windows is fine)

---

## First-time setup

```bash
bash setup.sh
```

The script will:
1. Create `.env` from `.env.example`
2. Start MySQL and wait for it to be healthy
3. Scaffold base Laravel into the project (preserving all custom files)
4. Install PHP and Node dependencies
5. Run database migrations and seed test accounts
6. Build frontend assets (Tailwind CSS + Alpine.js)

---

## Running the project

```bash
# Start (uses pre-built assets)
docker compose up

# Start with Vite HMR for frontend development
docker compose --profile dev up
```

Open **http://localhost:8085**

---

## Test accounts

| Email | Password | Role | Seats |
|-------|----------|------|-------|
| super@vcardapp.com | password | Super Admin | — |
| admin1@vcardapp.com | password | Admin | 5 |
| admin2@vcardapp.com | password | Admin | 3 |
| admin3@vcardapp.com | password | Admin | 3 |

---

## Architecture

```
Users (admins)
  └── Customers           — companies managed by an admin
        └── Employees     — each employee has one public vCard
              ├── Skills
              ├── Experiences
              └── Portfolio items
```

### Seat system
- Each admin has a `seats_total` quota set by the super admin
- Creating an active employee consumes 1 seat
- Deactivating an employee frees its seat
- The super admin adds seats via **Admin → Seats** panel

---

## Admin panel features

| Section | Who can access | What it does |
|---------|---------------|--------------|
| Dashboard | All | Stats, recent customers & employees |
| Customers | All | Create/edit customers with logo upload |
| Employees | All | Create/edit employee vCards (per customer) |
| Seats | All | View usage; super admin adds seats to any admin |
| Admins | Super admin | Create/delete admin accounts |

### Employee form sections
Each employee vCard has four editable sections:
1. **Basic Info** — name, title, bio, contact details, social URLs, profile photo
2. **Skills** — name + proficiency level (0–100%)
3. **Experience** — company, role, dates, description (timeline on public page)
4. **Portfolio** — title, category, image, URL, description (grid on public page)

---

## Public vCard page

Modelled after the Ryan vCard template:

- **Sidebar (dark)** — circular profile photo, name, title badge, contact icons, social links
- **Main content** — sticky tab bar switching between About / Resume / Skills / Portfolio
- **Skills** — animated progress bars
- **Experience** — vertical dot timeline
- **Portfolio** — hover-reveal project links

---

## Development commands

```bash
make setup          # run setup.sh
make up             # docker compose up -d
make dev            # start with Vite HMR (--profile dev)
make down           # stop containers
make shell          # open shell in app container
make artisan <cmd>  # run any artisan command
make migrate        # run migrations
make fresh          # migrate:fresh --seed (wipes data)
make mysql          # open MySQL CLI
make logs           # tail app + nginx logs
```

---

## Environment variables

Key variables in `.env` (copied from `.env.example`):

| Variable | Default | Notes |
|----------|---------|-------|
| `APP_PORT` | `8085` | Nginx port on host |
| `DB_PORT` | `3306` | MySQL port on host |
| `VITE_PORT` | `5173` | Vite HMR port (dev profile) |
| `DB_DATABASE` | `vcard_app` | MySQL database name |
| `DB_PASSWORD` | `secret` | MySQL user password |

---

## Project structure

```
app/Http/Controllers/Admin/   — admin panel controllers
app/Http/Controllers/Auth/    — login / logout
app/Http/Controllers/         — VCardController (public page)
app/Http/Middleware/           — EnsureAdmin (role-based guard)
app/Models/                   — 7 Eloquent models
database/migrations/          — 7 custom migrations
database/seeders/             — seeds 4 user accounts
resources/views/
  layouts/admin.blade.php     — sidebar admin layout
  vcard/show.blade.php        — public profile page
  admin/{customers,employees,seats,users}/
routes/web.php                — all application routes
docker-compose.yml            — 4 services: app, nginx, mysql, node
Dockerfile                    — PHP 8.3-FPM + Composer
```

---

## Tech stack

- **Backend:** PHP 8.3, Laravel 11
- **Database:** MySQL 8
- **Frontend:** Tailwind CSS v3, Alpine.js v3, Vite
- **Dev environment:** Docker Compose
